title: Hero Pro Pack
description: Resource packs for Hero Pro Mod
body:
## Here are all available resource packs for Hero Pro Mod

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HLGcTvYO/images/c900076654d81c0ab6b194cc07c5433f6c44c2a5.png)

---

#### - Version Rainbow contains animated textures for all rainbow items and armor only in alpha-beta feel.

#### - Version Modern Rainbow contain nanimated textures for all rainbow items and armor only in modern 1.14+ style. Work in Progress

#### - Version Complete contains all alpha-beta textures and sounds collected from the web by me plus the original textures form the mod. There might be more to be found! 
*Note: Complete versions don't contain rainbow animated textures. (Some people may not like to have them) To have correctly working animated textures put the Rainbow above Complete in resource pack order.*

---
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HLGcTvYO/images/76355707b2f1f2b89abea59a729c28c7f37139f1.png)
---
